ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode (major or minor) of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "track_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's page on the streaming service */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "verified_artist" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the artist is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_counts" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play count record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the play count was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to play the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from where the track was played */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's listening session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_counts_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's image */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "verified_user" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Preferred music genres of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
